diagramConstraints.description: Represent external entities (sources/sinks) as rectangles at diagram edges
Number processes sequentially (1.0, 2.0, etc.) for reference
Represent data stores with parallel lines or open-ended rectangles, labeled with store name
Label all data flows with the type of data being transferred

formattingRules.description: Keep each diagram at a single level of abstraction; use separate diagrams for decomposition
